text.message: Oj, the only possible game I have is this port... And you have options
Lets not fight over it, I am last here by a mile
If someone is soloed, shouldnt it be red?
I cant see me or oj winning
You did try to plow my only option
how many more presents you want
you got there cause I didn’t play my knight against you buddy
I told you, without road I was dead
it was also my only way to win
how can I have 4 if you have 2
